description: Phase 33: Observability, SRE, Chaos - Add browser RUM, structured log PII scrubber, comprehensive Grafana dashboards (RED+USE), alert runbook templates, disaster recovery procedures, and game day scenarios to @quant/observability and infra/.
steps: 1. Add packages/observability/src/browser-rum.ts: Implement BrowserRUM class with collectWebVitals(metrics), trackUserJourney(steps), reportError(error, context), measureInteraction(name, duration). Track CLS, FID, LCP, TTFB, INP with automatic reporting to OTel endpoint.

2. Add packages/observability/src/pii-scrubber.ts: Implement PIIScrubber class that detects and redacts PII from log entries. Patterns: email, phone, SSN, credit card, IP addresses, JWT tokens. Methods: scrub(logEntry), addPattern(name, regex, replacement), getRedactionStats().

3. Add packages/observability/src/alert-rules.ts: Define AlertRuleGenerator class that generates Prometheus alert rules programmatically. Methods: generateREDAlerts(service), generateUSEAlerts(service), generateSLOAlerts(service, sloConfig). Each alert includes severity, runbook_url, description with thresholds.

4. Add packages/observability/src/disaster-recovery.ts: Implement DisasterRecovery class with: createBackupSchedule(service, rpo), verifyBackup(backupId), drDrill(scenario) returns DrillResult, calculateRTO(service). Include backup verification logic and DR drill scenario runner.

5. Add packages/observability/src/game-day.ts: Implement GameDayRunner class orchestrating chaos game days. Methods: planGameDay(scenarios, team), executeScenario(scenario), generatePostmortem(results). Integrates with ChaosExperimentRunner from chaos-experiments.ts.

6. Add infra/grafana/dashboards/red-metrics.json: Grafana dashboard JSON with panels for Request Rate, Error Rate, Duration (p50/p95/p99) for all services. Include template variables for namespace and service filtering.
7. Add infra/grafana/dashboards/use-metrics.json: Grafana dashboard JSON with panels for CPU Utilization, Memory Saturation, Network Errors per service pod. Include node-level and pod-level views.
8. Add infra/grafana/dashboards/slo-overview.json: Grafana dashboard showing SLO compliance per service, error budget burn rate, and multi-burn-rate alerts status.
9. Add infra/prometheus/alerts/service-slos.yml: Additional alert rules for per-service SLOs covering all 14 apps + key services.

10. Add docs/runbooks/ directory with: docs/runbooks/high-error-rate.md, docs/runbooks/high-latency.md, docs/runbooks/pod-crash-loop.md, docs/runbooks/slo-burn-rate.md, docs/runbooks/disk-pressure.md. Each runbook has: symptoms, diagnosis steps, remediation, escalation path.
11. Add docs/disaster-recovery.md documenting backup strategy, RTO/RPO targets, DR drill procedures.
13. Update packages/observability/src/index.ts barrel to export all new modules.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test passes for @quant/observability with all new test files
All new Grafana dashboards are valid JSON with proper panel structure
All runbooks exist in docs/runbooks/ with required sections
New alert rules in infra/prometheus/alerts/service-slos.yml are valid YAML
